Captopril_Baseline.description: Systolic blood pressure at baseline for patients in the Captopril group. Used together with Captopril_After_1_week to compute the change in blood pressure. These values correspond to the same patients as Captopril_After_1_week.

Captopril_After_1_week.description: Systolic blood pressure after 1 week of treatment for patients in the Captopril group. Used together with Captopril_Baseline to compute the change in blood pressure. These values correspond to the same patients as Captopril_Baseline.

Placebo_Baseline.description: Systolic blood pressure at baseline for patients in the Placebo group. Used together with Placebo_After_1_week to compute the change in blood pressure. These values correspond to the same patients as Placebo_After_1_week.

Placebo_After_1_week.description: Systolic blood pressure after 1 week of treatment for patients in the Placebo group. Used together with Placebo_Baseline to compute the change in blood pressure. These values correspond to the same patients as Placebo_Baseline.
